tools.name: validate_assets
tools.description: Run Unreal's official Data Validation system (UEditorValidatorSubsystem) on specified assets or the entire project. Checks for missing references, invalid properties, broken dependencies, and project-specific validators. This is a read-only diagnostic tool — use it after creating or modifying assets to verify correctness beyond compile success.

asset_paths.description: Array of content paths to validate (e.g., ['/Game/Blueprints/BP_Player', '/Game/Materials/M_Rock'])

validate_all.description: If true, validate ALL project assets under /Game/. Can be slow on large projects. Default: false.

tools.name: run_automation_tests
tools.description: Run Unreal Automation Tests matching a filter pattern. Tests run asynchronously — use read_message_log with category_filter='LogAutomationTest' to check results after a few seconds. Common filters: 'Project.' for project tests, 'Functional.' for functional tests, 'Engine.' for engine tests.

test_filter.description: Filter pattern to match test names (e.g., 'Project.', 'Functional.MyTest', '*' for all). Default: 'Project.'

list_only.description: If true, list matching tests without running them. Default: false (runs tests).
